source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Energetic product UI typography with bold English hierarchy, compact numeric dashboards, and Japanese typography guidance for clean Gothic headings, labels, tables, and forms.
layout: Pop interaction dashboards, command surfaces, dense data cards, hanging-basket navigation rhythm, 8px radii, magenta actions, purple secondary controls, green stem success states, and soft mauve borders.

prompts.label: Transparent fuchsia flower motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat cyan chroma-key background, followed by local chroma-key removal to RGBA.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Fuchsia transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete fuchsia flower motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A dangling shade-basket fuchsia flower cluster with elegant pendant blossoms, vivid magenta outer sepals, rich purple inner corollas, slender green stems, small green leaves, subtle shaded basket botanical character, crisp natural petal texture, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete botanical cutout with several blossoms and stems visible, generous padding, no cropping, no vase, no pot, no basket hardware, no environment.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ffff cyan background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ffff or cyan anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second subject, no generic rose or orchid look.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Fuchsia light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Fuchsia, derived from the visible fuchsia flower cutout.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction mood from the fuchsia motif: vivid magenta petals, saturated purple corollas, green stems and leaves, shaded hanging-basket neutrals, pale petal highlights, and pop interaction accents. The board must visibly respect only these motif-derived colors.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 high-resolution source composition, polished product design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Fuchsia, Fuchsia Flower, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard KPI tiles, line and bar charts, data table, command palette search, status chips, form validation, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius samples, border and shadow samples.
Typography: include English UI hierarchy and Japanese typography samples for clear product UI; use large readable labels, not tiny paragraphs.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-like UI board, precise grid, crisp components, 8px radii, quiet surfaces with energetic pop interactions.
Color palette: magenta, purple, green stem, shaded basket neutrals, petal white and soft mauve only. Avoid unrelated blue/orange/yellow palettes and generic gradients.
Text: use short readable labels; ensure the title reads exactly "Morphous Fuchsia".
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand logos, no illegible microtext, no unrelated saturated colors, no misspelling of Morphous Fuchsia.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Fuchsia dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board for Morphous Fuchsia that feels like the visible light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible fuchsia motif and visible light design-system board as references. Preserve palette roles, typography scale, 8px radius system, component language, dashboard structure, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, and texture samples.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 high-resolution source composition, polished professional design-system presentation. The top-left area must contain only the title text and motif content, with no decorative mark, no corner logo, no stamp, no signature, no watermark, no initials, and no small standalone icon.
Required visible sections: Morphous Fuchsia, Fuchsia Flower, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Visual details: deep purple and shaded basket charcoal backgrounds, smoky plum elevated panels, pale petal foreground text, magenta primary actions, purple secondary controls, green stem success states, soft mauve borders, crisp shadcn-style components.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sidebar navigation, top navigation, KPI tiles, line and bar charts, table, command palette, status chips, form validation, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing, 8px radius, border and shadow samples.
Typography: English UI hierarchy and Japanese typography samples with large readable labels.
Text: use short readable labels; ensure the title reads exactly "Morphous Fuchsia" and include "Dark Mode".
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand logos, no corner glyphs, no unrelated blue/orange/yellow palette, no neon overload, no flat pure black, no illegible microtext, no misspelling of Morphous Fuchsia.
